series_metadata.series_description: Reports written by enforcement officers when monitoring the ODJFS offices in the counties to ensure compliance with EEO guidelines. The reports include the number of clients served, staff and facility assessments, reviews of job applications and orders, comments and responses to the reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits are complete and released, and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years, then destroy provided audits are complete and released, and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
